name: Improper Neutralization of Data within XQuery Expressions ('XQuery Injection')
description: The product uses external input to dynamically construct XQuery expressions for retrieving data from an XML database without properly neutralizing that input. This allows attackers to manipulate the query logic, bypass authentication, or extract unauthorized data.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node carrying user input flows into a TRANSFORM node constructing an XQuery expression that reaches an EXTERNAL[xml_database] or STORAGE node without passing through a TRANSFORM[sanitize] or CONTROL[validate] node
